_comment: Operational + release-category labels installed per-repo by scaffold-repo (idempotent: ensure-by-name, never delete). Type/Size/Tier/Priority are NOT labels here — they are Issue Type, Project fields, and an org Issue Field respectively (field-homes rule). These labels cover (a) deferred metered-AI opt-in gates (created disabled) and (b) the release-note categories release.yml groups by.

labels.name: blocked
labels.description: Has an open blocked-by dependency (mirrors the derived Blocked field for the issue list).

labels.name: ready
labels.description: AC-complete and gated by the lead.

labels.name: ac-review
labels.description: Deferred metered-AI opt-in (created disabled): opt-in metered AI PR review vs AC.

labels.name: auto-implement
labels.description: Deferred metered-AI opt-in (created disabled): opt-in metered AI auto-implementation.

labels.name: release:feature
labels.description: Release-note category -> Features (mirrors Type=Feature for the changelog).
